description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular industrial building with a prominent gabled roof clad in blue-gray metal panels. The facade features a grid of large, multi-pane windows along the length of the structure, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front and rear elevations are distinguished by wide entry doors, with the front facade displaying decorative cross-bracing and geometric trim above the main entrance. The roof is punctuated by a series of evenly spaced skylights, enhancing illumination inside. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The overall design is functional, with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing utility and efficient access.
description: A large, rectangular warehouse with a blue-gray gabled metal roof, extensive multi-pane windows, and wide entry doors. The facade features geometric trim and cross-bracing, with skylights along the roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with wide doors, decorative cross-bracing, and geometric trim above the entry, as well as large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of multi-pane windows and the expanse of the blue-gray metal roof with visible skylights.
description_view_2: Rear view with a wide door similar to the front but with less decorative trim, and large windows above the entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the continuous row of windows and skylights on the roof.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a wide entry door flanked by large, multi-pane windows and is topped with geometric cross-bracing and trim. The exterior is finished in light gray with contrasting window frames and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a steeply pitched gabled structure clad in blue-gray metal panels, with a series of evenly spaced rectangular skylights providing natural light. The roof is continuous and unbroken by additional equipment or features.
